nodes.name: CCIS entrance
nodes.instruction: You are at the CCIS main entrance. Cameron Library is to the right. Turn right and start walking toward Student Services.

nodes.name: Student Services corridor
nodes.instruction: You have passed Student Services. There is a door in front of you that could be closed. Cross it, then turn right to continue toward Chemistry.

nodes.name: Door to Chemistry
nodes.instruction: There is a door in front of you that might be closed. Open the door and keep going straight to enter the Chemistry building, heading toward CAB.

nodes.name: Chemistry hallway
nodes.instruction: You're on the right path. Keep going straight through the Chemistry hallway toward CAB.

nodes.name: Wrong turn
nodes.instruction: You are diverted from right path. Re-routing. Turn around and go straight.

nodes.name: Turn left to CAB
nodes.instruction: Turn left and walk towards CAB.

nodes.name: CAB and Cameron intersection
nodes.instruction: You have reached the CAB and Cameron intersection. Turn right and go straight towards Cameron Library.

nodes.name: Stairs to Cameron
nodes.instruction: There is stairs going down in front of you. Climb down carefully and go straight towards Cameron entrance.

nodes.name: Cameron main desk
nodes.instruction: You have arrived at the Cameron main desk. Have a nice one.
